## Summary
Describe the feature in 2–4 sentences.
What is being proposed, and what should it unlock?

## Problem / Opportunity
What problem does this solve?
Who is affected?
Why is this worth doing now?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the ideal solution clearly.
Include expected behavior, UX changes, system flow, or protocol-level changes if relevant.

## Scope
What is included in this request?
What is explicitly out of scope?

## Acceptance Criteria
List the conditions that must be true for this feature to be considered complete.

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Dependencies / Constraints
Mention technical dependencies, blockers, tradeoffs, related issues, PRs, or docs.

## Additional Context
Add links, references, diagrams, mockups, or supporting material here.
